description_long: This is a full-sized outdoor basketball court set on a rectangular slab, featuring a tan playing surface with blue painted key areas at both ends. The court is marked with standard basketball lines, including the three-point arc, free throw lanes, center circle, and baselines. Two basketball hoops with rectangular glass backboards are positioned at either end of the court, mounted on sturdy poles. The surrounding area is a gray surface, likely representing concrete or asphalt, providing a buffer zone around the court. The court is open and does not appear to have any fencing or enclosure. The overall design is typical of urban recreational basketball courts found in parks or public spaces.
description: A full-sized outdoor basketball court with tan and blue markings, two glass backboards, and a surrounding gray surface. The court is open and unfenced, designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: A wide, angled view showing the entire court, both hoops, and the surrounding gray surface.
description_view_1: A head-on view from behind one hoop, highlighting the backboard, key area, and court markings.
description_view_2: A mirrored wide view similar to view 0, showing the court from the opposite side.
description_view_3: A head-on view from the opposite end, focusing on the other hoop and key area.
